monte_carlo.method: Block-bootstrap of joint historical segments (index return, ret_0–ret_3, T-bill); listed ETP where available with VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset pre-inception.

levered_pnl_model: 1x unlevered S&P 500 exposure (SPY or VUSA.L/VUAG.L UCITS); no ETP leverage decay. Monte Carlo: Block-bootstrap of joint historical segments (index return, ret_0–ret_3, T-bill); listed ETP where available with VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset pre-inception.
